image:image.image:title: Detach App Blocker for iPhone
image:image.image:caption: Detach is a physical iPhone app blocker. Block social media and distracting apps using an NFC card. Cheaper alternative to Brick.

image:image.image:title: Detach Card - Physical iPhone App Blocker
image:image.image:caption: The Detach card. $9.99 one-time. NFC card that physically blocks apps on your iPhone. No subscription. Free shipping USA.
